response.justification: Strong software engineer with proven scale and craftsmanship excellence, but the resume shows no experience with experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, or statistical analysis—core expertise explicitly required for this Principal role. Current Staff-level work in AI-agent infrastructure is adjacent to but not directly aligned with growth and experimentation systems. Additionally, recently promoted to Staff (1 month ago), whereas Principal/IC6 typically requires deeper tenure at senior+ levels.
strengths: Proven experience at massive scale: Dunnhumby handled millions of HTTP requests/second with real-time metadata in low-latency systems
Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture: organized refactoring dojos, taught TDD workshops, established CI/CD practices across multiple organizations
Technical leadership spanning full-stack environments: Staff roles at Altom and re:cinq, multiple senior positions, evidence of mentoring and knowledge sharing
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing framework, or feature-flag system experience despite experimentation infrastructure being the primary focus of this role
Missing data aptitude: no background in metrics infrastructure design, telemetry systems, statistical analysis, or experimental analysis workflows
Career trajectory: only 1 month at Staff level; Principal/IC6 typically requires 10+ years at senior+ levels and demonstrated cross-team platform influence at scale
